name: Common Rat
flavour_text: Rats. We're rats. We're the rats.
tips: Common Rat's real value is as promote fodder for Giant Rat. A 1-mana investment that becomes a 30/30 when Giant Rat dies.
Ratchanter conjures copies of this card from the deck for 2 mana, thinning your draws and building board width.
Keep at least one alive whenever possible — it's insurance for Giant Rat's death trigger and a valid target for Grave Caller's Dark Matter buff.
Multiple Common Rats on board multiply the value of Ratchanter's activated ability, since all Rats get buffed each activation.
At 10/10 for 1 mana, it can trade into damaged midrange minions or chip in sacrifice pressure by advancing down a lane.
rulings: Common Rat has no effects of its own — all its value comes from interacting with cards that reference Rat tribe (Giant Rat, Ratchanter, Ratical Resurrection, To The Ratmobile).
As a vanilla 10/10, Common Rat dies to any 10+🗡️ attack in one hit and is often used as a Feed the Shadow sacrifice for 10 damage at 1+2 = 3 total mana.
